## 📝 Additional Context

Any other information that might be helpful:

- Was this working before?
- Are you using default settings?
- Have you tried workarounds?
- Does this affect production or test system?

---

## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues
- [ ] I have read the README and documentation
- [ ] I have tried troubleshooting steps from TROUBLESHOOTING.md
- [ ] I am running the latest version
- [ ] I can reproduce this issue consistently

---

## 📎 Attachments

Attach files if helpful (logs, screenshots, config files):
- Make sure to remove any sensitive information!
- Remove passwords, credentials, API keys
- OK to include: error messages, logs, config settings

---

**Thank you for the detailed bug report! We'll investigate and get back to you soon.** 🛡️
